mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_model_registry ( model_name, model_version, algo_type, mlflow_run_id, artifact_path, mae, rmse, mase, crps, train_parts, train_weeks, status, deploy_time, create_time ) VALUES ( #{modelName}, #{modelVersion}, #{algoType}, #{mlflowRunId}, #{artifactPath}, #{mae}, #{rmse}, #{mase}, #{crps}, #{trainParts}, #{trainWeeks}, #{status}, #{deployTime}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, model_name, model_version, algo_type, mlflow_run_id, artifact_path, mae, rmse, mase, crps, train_parts, train_weeks, status, deploy_time, create_time FROM ai_model_registry WHERE model_name = #{modelName} AND status = 'PRODUCTION' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_model_registry SET status = #{status}, deploy_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PRODUCTION' THEN NOW() ELSE deploy_time END WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, model_name, model_version, algo_type, mlflow_run_id, artifact_path, mae, rmse, mase, crps, train_parts, train_weeks, status, deploy_time, create_time FROM ai_model_registry WHERE model_name = #{modelName} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, model_name, model_version, algo_type, mlflow_run_id, artifact_path, mae, rmse, mase, crps, train_parts, train_weeks, status, deploy_time, create_time FROM ai_model_registry WHERE model_version = #{version} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
